description: Custom software for photo booth operators — features, integrations, and tools built to spec.

items.name: Snappic Feature Builds
items.description: Custom modules and workflow extensions for the Snappic platform.

items.name: booth.events Feature Builds
items.description: Custom reporting, workflow, and automation extensions for booth.events.

items.name: Twilio Setup
items.description: SMS notifications, review requests, and automated messaging for your events.

items.name: Custom Webhooks
items.description: Connect your booth software to any third-party platform via webhook pipelines.

items.name: Custom Microsites
items.description: Branded guest experience pages that match your event design, not a generic URL.

items.name: Custom Analytics
items.description: Event performance dashboards — prints, shares, peak times, engagement metrics.

items.name: Branded Impact Reports
items.description: Post-event reports for corporate clients: attendee stats, engagement data, social reach.

items.name: Gamified Microsites
items.description: Interactive experiences built around your booth — custom per-event, high engagement.

items.name: Online Voting / Leaderboards
items.description: Per-event interactive features that extend the booth experience. Methods stay private.

items.name: Review-Hunter SMS Tool
items.description: Automated post-event review request sequences. Built and in production at MIGHTY.

description: Small team, real-agency creatives. Not a design factory. Every project gets a human designer.

items.name: Basic Photo Booth Event Package
items.description: Welcome screen + 2 matching overlays + microsite background with custom-coded CSS + 2 edit requests.

items.name: Backdrop Design Only
items.description: Any size. Single or double-sided. Step-and-repeat OK. Logo integration OK.

items.name: Backdrop Full Package
items.description: Design + delivery + frame + custom fabric + carry bag. 48 contiguous states only. Standard 2–3 weeks. Rush (3–7 days) adds $75.

items.name: Custom 2×3 Attract Signage w/ QR
items.description: Eye-catching signage with your QR code. Client prints locally.

items.name: Custom Crew / Product Checklists
items.description: Mobile-friendly and printer-friendly. Tailored to your gear and workflow.

description: Proof: mightyphotobooths.com ranks page 1 for photo booth rental Dallas and surrounding clusters. Zero paid ads. Years sustained.

items.name: Website SEO Review + Report
items.description: Keyword mapping, on-page analysis, GBP audit, and a prioritized fix list.

items.name: Competitor Report
items.description: Up to 10 named competitors — or full area discovery via passive OSINT. Per competitor: strengths, weaknesses, pricing, venues, contact info, years active, easy wins. Color-coded service-area map included.

items.name: Social Media Intel Add-On
items.description: Actionable social intel: market share signals, bot-follower detection, upload patterns, post-style breakdown (BTS / highlight / educational), and engagement analysis.

description: Professional-grade security work for photo booth operators who take their business seriously.

items.name: Security / Vulnerability Scan
items.description: Professional cybersecurity stack. Signed engagement letter required. Comprehensive report delivered.

items.name: Implementation / Hardening
items.description: Add-on after scan. Remediation, configuration hardening, and follow-up verification.

items.name: Remote Server Setup
items.description: VPS provisioning, DNS, firewall rules, SSH hardening, and monitoring hooks.

items.name: IDE / Claude / ChatGPT Setup
items.description: Hands-on AI tooling setup for operators who want to start building but don't know where to start.

items.name: DNS Configuration
items.description: Domain, subdomain, email authentication (SPF/DKIM/DMARC), and CDN wiring.

items.name: Anything Nerdy and Difficult
items.description: Probably can help. Drop a line.

description: Already built and running at MIGHTY Photo Booths. Available for other operators.

items.name: W9 Generator
items.description: Generates a complete W9 request package for any vendor or sub. Pre-filled, signed, filed.

items.name: Inbox Agent
items.description: Trains on your sent email. Learns your voice and tone. Drafts responses, surfaces leads, sends a morning action brief. Audience-aware directives.
